description: Create a multi-output soybean processing model in openLCA using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). Define a process named 'Soybean Processing, at plant' that produces 0.185 kg of 'Soybean Oil, crude' and 0.795 kg of 'Soybean Meal' (both mass-based flows), incorporating at least one electricity input and one CO2 emission. Apply mass-based physical allocation to the process. Calculate the LCIA for the Soybean Oil product system using the TRACI 2.1 method and export the results to ~/LCA_Results/soybean_allocation.csv.
